name: cfg-v3-sync-fn
description: The ONLY hosted privileged endpoint on V3: syncDonations — an admin-gated 2nd-gen callable that pulls Zeffy payments+campaigns into Firestore donations/{id}. Kept in its own codebase so `firebase deploy --only functions` never touches the unrelated Blaze-reference functions/ design. The Zeffy API key stays server-side via a Functions secret (ZEFFY_API_KEY).
